name: polymath-connector-honeycomb
description: Honeycomb connector: MCP for queries/traces + trace-investigate skill that walks a trace and surfaces the offending span with its dependency chain.

honeycombApiKey.title: Honeycomb API key
honeycombApiKey.description: From Team settings → Environments. Use an environment-scoped key, not a classic ingest key.

honeycombDataset.title: Default dataset
honeycombDataset.description: Default dataset name (e.g. 'refund-api'). Required by Honeycomb queries.
